completed.summary: Added city wall outer ring with crenellation dots, temple gold triangles (up to 3), monument blue diamonds (up to 2), population growth progress bar below city circle, border pulse animation on level-up (~1.25s fade ring), and RENAME CITY option cycling through tribe name pool. 520 tests pass, 0 regressions.

Added score breakdown panel to end-of-game screen showing per-category breakdown (temples, monuments, cities, units, technology). ScorePopup component displays ScoreBreakdown with categories array and total calculation.

Added monument scoring: +30 per monument at game end. City.monumentCount field tracks built monuments via new Monuments building on city tile. computeTribeScore() includes monumentScore. 515 tests pass.
Added temple scoring: +20 per temple at game end. City.templeCount field separate from buildings[]. computeTribeScore() includes templeScore. 515 tests pass.
Elyrion special tribe: Polytaur replaces Warrior (no Sanctuaries). Starts with Forestry.

Cymanti special tribe: Hexapod replaces Warrior, Doomux replaces Swordsman, Ryy replaces Archer. Starts with Mycelium instead of Org. All units poison on attack (no riders, knights, or ships). Centipede grows on kills (Segments). 515 tests pass.
Polaris special tribe: Ice Archer, Ice Fortress, Gaami, Mooni replace standard units. All units freeze on attack. Starts with Philosophy + Ice Bank. Can't chop trees. 515 tests pass.
Added naval combat: Ships, Ports, naval movement rules. Battleship upgrade. 515 tests pass.
Added air units: Bird riders (Elyrion), Mooni (Polaris), Ryy (Cymanti). Movement ignores terrain. 502 tests pass.

Player spawn system: all 16 tribes spawn with warrior + explorer. Elyrion spawns with Polytaur. Cymanti spawns with Hexapod. Balanced resource distribution (5-8 resources/tribe). Map boundary validation ensures no spawn overlaps. 17 unit tests + 480 game type tests pass.
Fixed multiplayer state crash: deep-clone GameState before passing to multiplayer handler. 17 multiplayer-specific tests pass.
Fixed ranged combat for multi-tile cities: archers/catapults target city center hex correctly. 460 tests pass.
Fixed resource double-count on territory expansion. 450 tests pass.
Fixed city radius conflict: cities within 2 tiles of each other share border tiles. 440 tests pass.
CLI init bug: GameState.players[0].units was undefined. 420 tests pass.
Water bodies, mountain ranges, forest clusters, fruit + animal resources, city ruins. All terrain types generate correctly.
Turn timing logic: only current player's units are active. Enforced unit limit (10 units per city + 10 bonus per capital).
Next.js basePath set to '/polytopia' in next.config.js for deployment behind nginx reverse proxy.
Tribe selection infinite loop: default bot tribes were generated twice — once on init and once on game start. Fixed by only generating default bot tribes once.

Added ranged projectile animation: archers/catapults fire a projectile sprite (colored circle with trail) toward target instead of lunging. Melee units retain existing lunge animation. All 4 sub-items now complete (attack lunge, death fade, damage numbers, ranged projectile). 515 tests pass.
Synthesized Web Audio API sound effects: UI clicks, tribe select chime, attack hit, unit death, city capture fanfare, looping ambient arpeggio. Mute button synced. 515 tests pass, 0 regressions.

Enhanced tech tree panel with: (1) dependency edges with arrows between prerequisite and dependent techs, (2) progress bars showing star accumulation toward research cost, (3) category filter tabs (ALL/MILITARY/ECONOMIC/NAVAL). 515 tests pass, build clean.

Fixed tribe selection mapping: SelectScene now passes humanTribeId (string) instead of sorted index. GameScene resolves the correct tribe by id lookup against unsorted TRIBE_CONFIGS. Every tribe card now starts the correct game. 515 tests pass, build clean.
Responsive Phaser canvas: RESIZE scale mode, layoutHUD() repositions all HUD elements proportionally, SelectScene tribe cards wrap on narrow screens, multi-touch enabled. 520 tests pass.

localStorage auto-save/load: SaveManager handles Map/Set serialization, auto-saves after each turn to slot 0, Load Game button in SelectScene restores full state. Handles QuotaExceededError gracefully. 522 tests pass.

Full-screen victory/defeat overlay: VICTORY!/DEFEAT title with winner announcement, score breakdown, Play Again (restarts with same settings) and Main Menu buttons. Perfection mode shows highest-scoring tribe. 522 tests pass.

Added volume slider (0-100%) below mute button with draggable thumb. SoundManager decoupled: volume and mute are independent controls. Mute+slider=50% = silent; unmute+50% = half volume. Volume persisted to localStorage (polytopia_volume), default 70%. Responsive layout redraws slider at scaled position. 522 tests pass.

Added ⚙️ gear button to HUD opening unified settings overlay. Panel has Audio section (mute toggle + volume slider synced with HUD) and Game Speed section (click to cycle Normal→Fast→Slow→Normal, applies immediately to cost multipliers). Backdrop click or X closes. Responsive layout scales with canvas. 522 tests pass, build clean.

Added keyboard shortcuts: Enter/E end turn, Tab/Shift+Tab cycle units (wrap around, center camera), Arrow keys pan camera (16px, bounded, hold-repeat), Space selects nearest unactioned unit (or acts at selectedHex). All handlers respect pause/AI guards. 522/522 tests pass, no regressions to W/ESC shortcuts.

Added end-turn confirmation dialog with unactioned unit count. Settings panel toggle (GAMEPLAY section) enables/disables. Smart skip when 0 unactioned units. Keyboard Enter/E also triggers dialog. localStorage persisted (polytopia_confirm_end_turn). Live verified: dialog appears when enabled + has unactioned unit, Cancel dismisses without ending turn, Yes ends turn. 522/522 tests pass, build clean.

Fixed settings panel speed labels to show speed multipliers instead of cost multipliers: Fast (×2), Slow (×0.5), Normal (×1). Added speedDisplayMultiplier() helper in GameScene.ts that inverts the internal cost multiplier for display. 522/522 tests pass, 0 regressions, build clean, verified live across all 3 speed states.

Added in-game statistics panel: 📊 button in HUD (next to ⚙️), semi-transparent overlay with per-tribe metrics (tribe name with color dot, cities, units alive, techs researched, stars, score). Human player row highlighted (brighter bg). Close via X button or backdrop click. Follows settings panel overlay pattern. 522/522 tests pass, build clean.

Added enemy proximity weighting to findExploreTarget(): AI explorers now devalue tiles near enemy cities/units using a linear decay penalty (PROXIMITY_PENALTY_MAX=3.0 within PROXIMITY_PENALTY_RADIUS=5 hexes). Combined enemy city and unit positions passed from decideMove. 523/523 tests pass (new test validates exploration away from enemy units).

Centered orphan tribe cards in incomplete grid rows. For 7 tribes on desktop (cols=6), Xin-xi now centered on bottom row instead of left-aligned. Last row cards get lastRowStartX computed from their own row width vs viewport. Full rows unchanged. 523/523 tests pass.

spec_gaps.item: AI territory expansion still basic — no strategic resource claiming
spec_gaps.evidence: 2026-06-28: findExploreTarget now weights tiles by resource value (commit 9b94846). Sub-item 1 (tile valuation) complete. Sub-items 2-4 (enemy proximity, chokepoint, settler logic) still open.

spec_gaps.item: AI difficulty differentiation now implemented (commit 98eba7b) — Easy avoids combat + picks economic, Hard hunts enemies + picks military
spec_gaps.evidence: Commit 98eba7b: chooseUpgrade now returns 'B' for Easy, 'A' for Hard (ignoring threat). decideAttack: Easy skips combat unless can one-shot or has 2:1 HP advantage. decideMove AI: Hard AI hunts enemy units within 8 hexes between city-target and village priorities. Difficulty differentiation is now observable. 520 tests pass.

14+ cycles stagnant. AI territory expansion requires strategic tile valuation, enemy proximity weighting, dead-end detection, and settler pathfinding — architectural complexity beyond a single tick. Needs research into original AI algorithms before implementation.

coach_review.notes: Coach review 2026-06-30T13:20:00Z. Verdict APPROVE. Reviewed fix-tribe-select-grid-balance (3735ec6): centered orphan Xin-xi card on bottom row instead of left-aligned. Structural gates: 523/523 tests pass, build clean, HTTP 200, no secrets/injection. Browser QA: tribe grid shows 6+1 layout with Xin-xi centered (x=640, midpoint of top row). Bardur game started correctly (Turn 1), end turn processed (AI advanced to Turn 2). 0 JS console errors. RefQA 4/4 pass. CFS 0.995 improving. P3 note: 6+1 grid layout still visually sparse on bottom row but centering was acceptable per task spec. Next: add-tribe-card-tooltips.

note: Implemented fix-tribe-select-grid-balance (3735ec6): Centered orphan tribe cards in incomplete grid rows. Xin-xi now centered bottom row. 523/523 tests pass. Moved to add-tribe-card-tooltips. Leave coach:pending.
